testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.native.JavaUdpTransportTest

testcase.name: recvPacket returns TIMEOUT when no data within timeout()
sendPacket and recvPacket round-trip on loopback()
recvPacket on unknown fd returns TIMEOUT()
setTos returns true for open socket()
setTimeout returns true for open socket()
setTtlAndCapture returns true for open socket()

testsuite.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\nabee\.gradle\caches\modules-2\files-2.1\net.bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.17\e3c251a39dc90badaf71c83427ba46840f219d8d\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.17.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
